flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-Channel Islands rose 91% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.5k → $10.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California State University-Channel Islands rose 64% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.0k → $4.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at California State University-Channel Islands fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (58.1% → 51.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Channel Islands fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
